text: Subcontractor  hereby  waives  and  releases  any  and  all  rights,  claims  and  causes  of  action  which Subcontractor may have against Contractor, the General Contractor and/or the owner of the Project, including any and  all  costs,  expenses  and  damages  incurred  by  Subcontractor,  arising  out  of  or  related  to  all  labor,  materials, equipment and/or services furnished for incorporation in or use or work on the Project through the Pay Period.
